audience_policies.source_phrase: Each pass admits up to 2 people at the discounted library price per person. Library passes are not valid for performances, events, or films. Advanced tickets are highly recommended since the museum cannot guarantee day-of reservations. Visit the museum website at https://www.icab

coupon.source_phrase_block: Each pass admits up to 2 people at the discounted library price per person. Library passes are not valid for performances, events, or films. Advanced tickets are highly recommended since the museum cannot guarantee day-of reservations. Visit the museum website at https://www.icaboston.org/ or call 617-478-3100
